calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-17-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Court Trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Arnold W. Evje, II, Esq., for the Plaintiff AKSHAY AMIN.
Plaintiff Akshay Amin sworn and examined on his own behalf.
No appearance by Defendant TERRY HOUSE.
On Order of the Court Defendants Does 1-10 are dismissed without prejudice.
After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The Rental Agreement is canceled.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 433 Ellis Street, #222, San Francisco, CA 94102.
Past-due rent $2,100.00
Holdover damages $699.90
Pre-judgment interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $240.00
for a Total Judgment of $3,039.90
Other: Defendant named in item 3a above must pay plaintiff $23.33 for each day that defendant remains on the premises named in item 4 above after the date of entry of this judgment.

Judgment signed in open court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Mar-17-2014 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-12-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: JPT Rebecca Grey; Clerk: M. Olopernes; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Akshay Amin is present.
Attorney Arnold Evje for the plaintiff.
Defendant Terry House DID NOT APPEAR.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant. The trial date of MAR-17-2014 remains on calendar. (D501)

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Feb-26-2014 Continued To Mar-17-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 501

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-26-2014 Continued To Mar-12-14 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 501
